_doc: Byte->Unicode map for the Sikkim Herald live-text Lepcha body font (named layout group: TT21B1O00/TT106DO00/TTDA7O00/TT70AO00, outline-identical across the 2021-11-19 / 2022-03-24 / 2022-04-07 / 2022-06-01 editions). Byte->glyphname is identity Latin (PDF /Encoding); the glyph OUTLINE is Lepcha. Derived by glyph-shape identity (NCC/IoU vs Noto Sans Lepcha + Mingzat) anchored on the alphabetic consonant structure and positional statistics, then round-trip-validated against the printed crops. See outputs/lepcha-map-derivation/.
_confidence: Consonants A..Z + lowercase conjuncts/SHA/WA + digits + post/pre vowels and final signs are confirmed. Byte 0x5D is U+1C2D FINAL K stored before the following base in the legacy visual stream: it is the sole missing final-sign slot, its outline is the top match, and corpus clusters become canonical only with next-base reordering. Byte 0x25 is U+1C25 SUBJOINED RA: it fills the sole missing medial and is independently attested in native base+NUKTA+RA and base+RA+vowel sequences. Byte 0x2D is literal hyphen punctuation. Bytes 0x2A, 0x28, 0x29, 0x2B, and 0x2F remain unresolved and are not guessed.
